skills.name: start-task
skills.description: Task kickoff and requirements gathering

skills.name: create-sdd-ticket
skills.description: Software Design Document ticket creation

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Create, improve, and evaluate skills with structured benchmarks

skills.name: implement-ticket
skills.description: Ticket implementation workflow

skills.name: apply-pr-feedback
skills.description: Apply GitHub PR review feedback to an existing branch (no new PR; updates the same branch)

skills.name: wiki-refresh
skills.description: Incrementally refresh docs/llm-wiki/ after code changes. Use when wiki is stale or after merging a feature branch.

skills.name: wiki-add-service
skills.description: Create a new service-doc page under docs/llm-wiki/wiki/services/ for a service that exists in the project but has no wiki page yet. Use when /wiki-refresh surfaces a missing-service suggestion.

skills.name: repo-fanout-pr
skills.description: Fans out a multi-repo change into one commit + push + PR per affected child repo and cross-links the PR bodies. Invoked by /implement-ticket Phase 9 when the workspace contains more than one git repo. Not for direct user use.

skills.name: mastering-git-cli
skills.description: Git version control operations: git status, git log, git diff, commits, branches, merge conflicts, rebase, stash, cherry-pick, git history, worktrees, submodules, and repository troubleshooting. Use for git commands, branch management, merge strategies, conflict resolution, commit history, viewing changes, checking repository state, and git workflows.

skills.name: create-pr
skills.description: Pull request creation and management

skills.name: doc-updater
skills.description: Maintain {{INSTRUCTION_FILE}} (CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md) and the three generated convention skills (code-conventions, multi-file-workflows, testing-conventions) accuracy after code changes. Surgical updates only; defers descriptive content to /wiki-refresh and graph maintenance to ensure-context.sh.

Use when setting up, extending, or reviewing a Playwright or Cypress test suite.

skills.name: wiki-ingest-external-docs
skills.description: Stage external descriptive docs (PDFs, DOCX, HTML, Notion/Confluence exports, GitHub issues, images) into docs/llm-wiki/raw/external/ following Karpathy's LLM-Wiki pattern. Content-addressed, manifest-indexed, export-first. Opt-in via wiki.cache_external in framework-config.json. wiki-refresh consumes the manifest on the next run.
